name: 3/4 sit-up
instructions: Lie flat on your back with your knees bent and feet flat on the ground.
Place your hands behind your head with your elbows pointing outwards.
Engaging your abs, slowly lift your upper body off the ground, curling forward until your torso is at a 45-degree angle.
Pause for a moment at the top, then slowly lower your upper body back down to the starting position.
Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.
description: The 3/4 sit-up is an abdominal exercise performed with body weight.

name: 45° side bend
instructions: Stand with your feet shoulder-width apart and your arms extended straight down by your sides.
Keeping your back straight and your core engaged, slowly bend your torso to one side, lowering your hand towards your knee.
Pause for a moment at the bottom, then slowly return to the starting position.
Repeat on the other side.
Continue alternating sides for the desired number of repetitions.
description: The 45° side bend is a bodyweight exercise targeting the abdominal muscles, particularly the obliques.

name: air bike
instructions: Lie flat on your back with your hands placed behind your head.
Lift your legs off the ground and bend your knees at a 90-degree angle.
Bring your right elbow towards your left knee while simultaneously straightening your right leg.
Return to the starting position and repeat the movement on the opposite side, bringing your left elbow towards your right knee while straightening your left leg.
Continue alternating sides in a pedaling motion for the desired number of repetitions.
description: The air bike is a bodyweight exercise targeting the abdominal muscles and hip flexors.

name: alternate heel touchers
instructions: Lie flat on your back with your knees bent and feet flat on the ground.
Extend your arms straight out to the sides, parallel to the ground.
Engaging your abs, lift your shoulders off the ground and reach your right hand towards your right heel.
Return to the starting position and repeat on the left side, reaching your left hand towards your left heel.
Continue alternating sides for the desired number of repetitions.
description: Alternate heel touchers is a bodyweight exercise targeting the abdominal muscles, particularly the obliques.

name: alternate lateral pulldown
instructions: Sit on the cable machine with your back straight and feet flat on the ground.
Grasp the handles with an overhand grip, slightly wider than shoulder-width apart.
Lean back slightly and pull the handles towards your chest, squeezing your shoulder blades together.
Pause for a moment at the peak of the movement, then slowly release the handles back to the starting position.
Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.
description: The alternate lateral pulldown is a cable machine exercise targeting the latissimus dorsi.

name: barbell bench press
instructions: Lie flat on your back on a bench.
Grip the barbell with hands slightly wider than shoulder-width.
Lower the bar to your chest slowly.
Push the bar back up until arms are fully extended.
Repeat for repetitions.
description: Classic chest building exercise using a barbell.

name: barbell squat
instructions: Place barbell on your traps.
Stand with feet shoulder-width apart.
Lower your hips until thighs are parallel to the floor.
Drive back up to starting position.
Repeat for repetitions.
description: The king of leg exercises, targeting quads and glutes.

name: dumbbell bicep curl
instructions: Stand with a dumbbell in each hand, palms facing forward.
Keep your elbows close to your torso.
Curl the weights while contracting your biceps.
Continue to raise the weights until your biceps are fully contracted.
Slowly begin to lower the dumbbells back to the starting position.
description: Isolation exercise for the biceps using dumbbells.

name: barbell overhead press
instructions: Start with the barbell at shoulder height.
Press the bar overhead until your arms are fully extended.
Lower the bar back to your shoulders.
Repeat for repetitions.
description: A fundamental compound press for shoulder strength.

name: pull-up
instructions: Grasp the pull-up bar with an overhand grip.
Hang with your arms fully extended.
Pull your body up until your chin is over the bar.
Lower yourself back down with control.
Repeat for repetitions.
description: Essential upper body pulling exercise.

name: push-up
instructions: Start in a plank position with hands slightly wider than shoulders.
Lower your body until your chest nearly touches the floor.
Push back up to the starting position.
Keep your core tight throughout.
description: The fundamental bodyweight chest exercise.

name: bodyweight lunge
instructions: Stand with feet hip-width apart.
Step forward with one leg and lower your hips.
Both knees should be bent at approximately a 90-degree angle.
Push back up to the starting position.
Repeat with the other leg.
description: Great functional exercise for lower body strength and balance.

name: plank
instructions: Start in a push-up position but with your weight on your forearms.
Keep your body in a straight line from head to heels.
Hold this position for the desired duration.
Keep your core engaged.
description: Isometric core strengthening exercise.

name: triceps dip
instructions: Grasp parallel bars and push yourself up.
Lower your body by bending your arms until they are at a 90-degree angle.
Push yourself back up to the starting position.
Keep your torso upright.
description: Powerful bodyweight exercise for the triceps.

name: burpees
instructions: Stand with your feet shoulder-width apart.
Drop into a squat position and place your hands on the ground.
Kick your feet back into a push-up position.
Perform a push-up (optional).
Jump your feet back to the squat position.
Jump up into the air with arms overhead.
description: High-intensity full body exercise for cardio and strength.

name: mountain climbers
instructions: Start in a plank position.
Bring one knee towards your chest.
Quickly switch legs, bringing the other knee forward.
Continue alternating at a fast pace.
description: Dynamic core and cardio exercise.

name: jumping jacks
instructions: Stand with your feet together and arms at your sides.
Jump up, spreading your feet and raising your arms overhead.
Jump again, returning to the starting position.
Repeat for a set duration or reps.
description: Classic cardio warm-up exercise.

name: barbell deadlift
instructions: Stand with feet hip-width apart, barbell over mid-foot.
Bend at the hips and knees to grasp the bar.
Keep your back flat and chest up.
Pull the bar up by extending your hips and knees.
Lower the bar back to the floor with control.
description: Master compound lift for posterior chain strength.

name: dumbbell lateral raise
instructions: Stand with dumbbells at your sides, palms facing in.
Raise your arms out to the sides until they are at shoulder level.
Slowly lower the dumbbells back to the starting position.
Maintain a slight bend in your elbows.
description: The best exercise for building side delt width.

name: barbell row
instructions: Bend at your hips and knees, holding a barbell with an overhand grip.
Pull the bar towards your lower chest.
Squeeze your shoulder blades together at the top.
Lower the bar back down with control.
description: Mass-building compound exercise for the back.

name: hammer curls
instructions: Stand with dumbbells at your sides, palms facing your torso.
Curl the weight up while keeping your palms facing each other.
Lower back down slowly.
Repeat for repetitions.
description: Builds bicep height and forearm thickness.

name: glute bridge
instructions: Lie on your back with knees bent and feet flat on the floor.
Lift your hips off the ground until your knees, hips and shoulders form a straight line.
Squeeze your glutes at the top.
Lower back down.
description: Effective glute activation and strengthening exercise.

name: standing calf raise
instructions: Stand with feet hip-width apart.
Raise your heels off the floor by pushing through your toes.
Squeeze your calves at the top.
Lower back down slowly.
description: Foundation exercise for calf development.

name: russian twists
instructions: Sit on the floor with your knees bent and feet slightly off the ground.
Lean back slightly and clasp your hands together.
Twist your torso to the right, then to the left.
Repeat for rotations.
description: Excellent exercise for oblique and rotational core strength.

name: triceps pushdown
instructions: Stand in front of a cable machine with a bar attachment.
Push the bar down until your arms are fully extended.
Squeeze your triceps at the bottom.
Slowly return to the starting position.
description: Popular cable exercise for triceps isolation.

name: leg press
instructions: Sit in the leg press machine and place feet on the platform.
Push the platform away by extending your legs.
Lower the platform back towards you slowly.
Do not lock your knees at the top.
description: Machine-based compound leg exercise for heavy volume.

name: lat pulldown (machine)
instructions: Sit at the machine and grab the bar with a wide grip.
Pull the bar down towards your upper chest.
Squeeze your back muscles at the bottom.
Slowly return the bar to the top.
description: Controlled machine alternative to the pull-up.

name: face pulls
instructions: Stand in front of a cable machine with a rope attachment.
Pull the rope towards your forehead.
Pull the ends of the rope apart as you pull towards you.
Slowly return to starting position.
description: Great for rear delt development and shoulder health.
